g.text: Ticker order uses hierarchical clustering on displayed macro betas.
Macro, rates, liquidity, risk, and thematic exposures
Macro Factor Sensitivities for AI, Tech, and Crypto-Linked Equities
Market beta remains a model control; the main heatmap emphasizes non-market macro and thematic exposures.
Standardized full-sample regressions from 2015-01-01 to 2026-04-30; alignment = daily; * p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01. Market controls are included in every
regression but separated from the main macro heatmap: S&P 500 return, Nasdaq minus S&P 500. Displayed macro factors included: BTC return, Semis minus SPY,
10y-2y nominal spread change, 10y real yield change, SOFR-IORB change, HY credit spread change, VIX change, Financial stress change, Reserve balances growth.
Skipped optional factors: none. Included stocks: AAPL, AMD, AMZN, ASML, AVGO, COIN, GOOG, IBM, MSFT, MSTR, NVDA, ORCL, PLTR, TSLA. Average aligned observations
